nodes.name: 🔒 Security & Validation Gate
nodes.notes: Rate limiting, file validation (type+size), input sanitization, prompt injection prevention

nodes.name: 🗂️ Fetch Job Config
nodes.notes: JobConfigs sheet columns: job_id | job_title | company_name | tenant_id | job_description | shortlist_threshold | review_threshold | hiring_manager_email | slack_channel | is_active

parameters.jsCode:
const submission = $('✅ Passes Validation?').item.json;
const jobConfig  = $input.item.json;

// Get the original binary data (CV file) from the validation node
const binaryData = $('✅ Passes Validation?').item.binary || {};

return [{
  json: {
    submission_id:        submission.submission_id,
    tenant_id:            submission.tenant_id,
    job_id:               submission.job_id,
    source:               submission.source,
    sender_email:         submission.sender_email,
    sender_name:          submission.sender_name,
    email_subject:        submission.email_subject,
    intake_type:          submission.intake_type,
    file_name:            submission.file_name,
    file_size_kb:         submission.file_size_kb,
    file_mime:            submission.file_mime,
    received_at:          submission.received_at,
    _raw_attachments:     submission._raw_attachments,

    job_title:            jobConfig.job_title            || 'Software Engineer',
    company_name:         jobConfig.company_name         || 'Our Company',
    job_description:      jobConfig.job_description      || 'Not specified',
    shortlist_threshold:  Number(jobConfig.shortlist_threshold) || 70,
    review_threshold:     Number(jobConfig.review_threshold)    || 45,
    hiring_manager_email: jobConfig.hiring_manager_email || 'hr@company.com',
    slack_channel:        jobConfig.slack_channel        || '#hiring',
    is_active:            jobConfig.is_active !== 'false',
    dedup_key:            submission.sender_email.toLowerCase() + '_' + submission.job_id
  },
  binary: binaryData   // ← THIS IS THE FIX — passes CV file forward
}];

values.content:
=Analyze this CV and return ONLY valid JSON:

CV TEXT:
{{ $json.cv_text }}

JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $json.job_description }}

Return this exact JSON structure:
{
  "name": "",
  "email": "",
  "phone": "",
  "current_role": "",
  "years_experience": 0,
  "education_level": "",
  "skills_found": [],
  "skills_missing": [],
  "skills_score": 0,
  "experience_score": 0,
  "education_score": 0,
  "communication_score": 0,
  "final_score": 0,
  "decision": "",
  "summary": "",
  "strengths": "",
  "weaknesses": ""
}

nodes.name: 📋 Write Compliance Audit Log
nodes.notes: GDPR/PDPA compliance — every screening decision logged with weights, reasoning, and bias flags

parameters.subject: =🎉 Interview Invitation — {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=

🎉 Congratulations, {{ $json.name }}!

{{ $json.company_name }} · {{ $json.job_title }}

Dear {{ $json.name }},


We have reviewed your CV and are delighted to invite you for an interview for {{ $json.job_title }}.

{{ $json.final_score }}/100
Profile Match · {{ $json.priority }}
✅ Your matching skills:
{{ $json.skills_found }}

{{ $json.summary }}


Please reply with your available times and preferred interview format (video/in-person).


Ref: {{ $json.candidate_id }}

{{ $json.company_name }} Recruitment · {{ $json.candidate_id }}

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value: =Hello {{ $json.name }}! Congratulations, you have been SHORTLISTED for {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}. Score: {{ $json.final_score }}/100. HR will contact you within 24 hours. Ref: {{ $json.candidate_id }}

nodes.name: 💬 WhatsApp — Candidate Notify
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_ACCOUNT_SID in URL with your Twilio Account SID

parameters.subject: =👀 Manual Review Needed — {{ $json.name }} ({{ $json.final_score }}/100) | {{ $json.job_title }}
parameters.message:
=

👀 Review Queue — Manual Assessment Required

A candidate scored in the review range and needs your assessment.

Name{{ $json.name }}
AI Score{{ $json.final_score }}/100 — {{ $json.priority }}
Experience{{ $json.years_experience }} yrs — {{ $json.current_role }}
Education{{ $json.education_level }} — {{ $json.education_institute }}
Skills Found{{ $json.skills_found }}
Skills Missing{{ $json.skills_missing }}
Red Flags{{ $json.red_flags }}
Bias Flags{{ $json.bias_flags }}
Summary{{ $json.summary }}

Candidate ID: {{ $json.candidate_id }}

parameters.subject: =Application Update — {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=

Thank You for Applying

Dear {{ $json.name }},


Thank you for applying for {{ $json.job_title }} at {{ $json.company_name }}. After reviewing your application, we will not be proceeding with your candidacy for this role at this time.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to apply for future openings.


Best regards,
{{ $json.company_name }} HR Team

Ref: {{ $json.candidate_id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, candidate_id: $json.candidate_id, submission_id: $json.submission_id, score: $json.final_score, decision: $json.decision, priority: $json.priority, processed_at: $json.processed_at }) }}

parameters.text: =🔥 New Shortlisted Candidate!  Name: {{ $json.name }} Score: {{ $json.final_score }}/100 Role: {{ $json.current_role }} Skills: {{ $json.skills_found }} Decision: {{ $json.decision }}
